title: Amy Heather
text:
POSTDOCTORAL RESEARCH ASSOCIATE AT THE UNIVERSITY OF EXETER
  GitHub    LinkedIn    Email 




Open reproducible
health data analysis
Experienced in developing and maintaining reproducible analytical workflows in Python and R, with a strong emphasis on transparency, adherence to best practices, and automation. Use tools such as Quarto and Streamlit to create accessible, well-documented outputs. Use packaging, continuous integration and deployment, and testing to ensure robust, reliable, and shareable research code.
